text.tspan: Two entry points, one convergent path.
Path A — GUI autosave per change
push to ring of last 5 hashes
log warn, use safe-subset (known fields only)
If pendingConfig set, drain via applyConfig.
Path C — Display connect/disconnect (independent of A and B)

svg.text: full state (enabled, syncMode, groupOf, groupLabels, spaceNames, _lastSeen, timing, hotkeys)
vim or VSCode or shell redirect
timing fields updated (switchDelay, debounceSeconds, popupDuration, statusDuration)
writeLastSeen position name uuid date wasIn
position rejoins groupOf if previously assigned
SpacesSync config change flow (revised after expert review)
